title: Shares of minors and in trust
doc_html:
§653.  Shares of minors and in trust

Shares may be issued in the name of a minor and in trust in such manner as the charter may provide.  When shares are so issued the name of the beneficiary must be disclosed to the credit union.
doc_text:
§653.  Shares of minors and in trust
Shares may be issued in the name of a minor and in trust in such manner as the charter may provide.  When shares are so issued the name of the beneficiary must be disclosed to the credit union.
